suggestions: What's the difference between a SIM and an eSIM?
Can I keep my existing mobile number?
Can I use my plan abroad?

intents.response:
Smart choice! eSIMs are brilliant - instant activation, no waiting for post, and you can switch between plans more easily.

Quick check: Do you know if your phone supports eSIM?
📱 Yes, it does
❓ How do I check?
🤔 What even is an eSIM?

Easy! Most iPhones from iPhone XS onwards and many newer Android phones support eSIM.

For iPhone:
Settings → Mobile Data → Add Data Plan (if you see this option, you're good to go!)

For Android:
Settings → Connections → SIM card manager → Add mobile plan

Still not sure? Tell me your phone model and I'll let you know!

keywords: difference between a sim and an esim
intents.response:
Great question! An eSIM is a digital SIM card built into your phone. Instead of inserting a physical card, you just scan a QR code and boom - you're connected!

Benefits:
✨ Instant activation
✨ No physical card to lose or damage
✨ Perfect for dual SIM setups
✨ Eco-friendly (no plastic)

Want to see our eSIM plans?

Fantastic! Let me show you our eSIM packages. Same brilliant plans as our physical SIMs, just activated instantly:
🔗 https://zoikotelecom.com/ee-mobile-plans/

Choose from 30-day, 12-month, or 24-month plans with various data allowances.

Quick tip: Once you order, you'll get a QR code by email within minutes. Scan it with your phone and you're connected!

Excellent! Let's get you sorted with proper broadband. We offer BT broadband packages with high-speed connectivity.

First up - do you know what speed you're after?
🐌 Just need the basics (emails, browsing)
🏃 Good all-rounder (streaming, working from home)
🚀 Super fast (4K streaming, gaming, multiple users)
❓ Help me choose!

Let's work this out together. How many people in your household?

And what do you mainly use the internet for?
💼 Working from home
📺 Streaming
🎮 Gaming
📱 General browsing and social media
🏠 All of the above!

Based on your answers, I'd recommend looking at the broadband packages that best fit your household and usage.

All packages include:

keywords: what payment methods do you accept
intents.response:
We accept:
• Debit cards
• Credit cards
• Direct Debit (for ongoing monthly payments)
suggestions: How do I cancel my service?

intents.response:
Monthly contracts: billed on the same date each month.

30-day rolling: billed every 30 days from activation.
suggestions: How do I cancel my service?

keywords: how do i cancel my service
intents.response:
30-day rolling: cancel anytime with 30 days' notice.

Fixed-term: early termination fees may apply.

📞 +44 207 164 6399
Installation typically takes 1-2 weeks from order confirmation. Some properties can be activated remotely within days.

intents.response: Yes! All our plans include EU roaming at no extra cost. For countries outside the EU, standard roaming charges apply.
